branch_worktree.reason: Task allowed only two report outputs.

behavior: Perturbs each UE true position by independent uniform noise in the supplied error range.
Sets every delta clock parameter for every node to zero.
Returns values ordered by scenario.symbolic_parameter_vector.
initialize_state.v24_risk: Truth-centered position initialization and all-clock zero initialization, not an explicit V24-gauged state initialization.

behavior: Shallow-copies the scenario.
Deletes every parameter whose name starts with delta_.
Substitutes deleted clocks with zero in measurement models.
Recomputes the Jacobian and overrides get_true_state and h with lambdas.
rm_clock_params.v24_risk: Clock-free auxiliary model, not a reference-satellite-gauged joint clock model.

behavior: Runs per-user downlink-only individual localization.
Constructs temporary one-user scenarios.
Calls async_gn_step and writes temporary state entries back into the full vector.
Effectively resets copied clock entries to zero because async_gn_step returns zeros in clock slots.
il_step.v24_risk: Temporary scenario node IDs are renumbered; correctness relies on compatible vector length/order rather than preserved symbol identity.

behavior: Deletes all delta parameters from x.
Runs one GN step on a clock-free scenario.
Reconstructs a full-length vector with clock entries set to zero.
async_gn_step.v24_risk: Direct use resets all clocks to zero and ignores the V24 clock subvector.

behavior: Uses pinv(J.T @ Sigma_z @ J).
Applies J.T @ Sigma_z @ residual update.
gn_step.v24_risk: Uses covariance weighting where V24 FIM/weighted least squares should use covariance inverse.

behavior: Computes an initial covariance-weighted pseudoinverse step that is overwritten.
Computes the operative step using inv(J.T @ inv(Sigma_z) @ J + lambda I).
Adds 1e-8 I to Sigma_z in place when cond(Sigma_z) > 1e10.
Accepts only if rho > 0 and true-state Euclidean error decreases.
Returns x, damping_factor, nu, and an updated boolean.
lm_step.v24_risk: Oracle true-state acceptance gate and direct inverses make this unsuitable as manuscript estimator provenance.

behavior: Uses identity F.
Uses Q = 0.
Uses R from scenario.get_measurement_covariance(tfap=easy).
Uses K = P J.T inv(S).
Updates covariance as (I - KJ) P_pred.
ekf_step.v24_risk: No drift/process model, no projection matrix, no Joseph form, and no structured rank/status reporting.

behavior: Unused self argument; fallback calls pass None.
Warns on shape mismatch but continues.
Uses identity F and Q = 1e2 I.
Uses pinv(J P J.T + R + 0 I).
Uses Joseph covariance update.
Reverts x_new if true-state error worsens but still returns updated covariance.
map_filter_iteration.v24_risk: Oracle-gated dynamic refinement can decouple reverted state from updated covariance.

risks: No residual or cost convergence criterion.

logic: Runs selected algorithm for num_steps + 1 iterations.
LM initializes damping with damp = 1.5 and nu = 1.9.
Stops only when converged and updated are both true.
Returns only a final state vector after check_output.
risks: Runtime warnings are not propagated into result tables.
LM rejected steps can prevent convergence status even with small state change.
No accepted/rejected iteration count is returned.

logic: Raises on NaN final or initial error.
Raises when final true-state error exceeds initial true-state error.
risks: Uses ground truth to define estimator acceptability.
Downstream broad except blocks can hide failures.

downstream_fallbacks.behavior: LM exceptions fall back to IL; MAP method lookup failures or other exceptions fall back to free map_filter_iteration.
LM exceptions fall back to IL; MAP exceptions fall back to free map_filter_iteration.
LM exceptions fall back to IL; MAP exceptions fall back to free map_filter_iteration.

numerical_tricks.risk: Can emit finite-looking values for rank-deficient systems without reportability status.

locations: cell 17 lm_step adds 1e-8 I to Sigma_z in place
cell 34 psd adds 1e-10 I for Cholesky

numerical_tricks.risk: Numerical repairs are not tracked in outputs or status.
Measurement pruning changes information content without a V24 reportability flag.
Zero SNR is converted to a finite variance case.

v24_regression_implications: Notebook state includes all clocks and does not enforce delta_{Nu+1} = 0.
Synchronization metric averages all delta parameters rather than V24 relative clocks excluding the reference satellite.
LM and MAP use true-state oracle gates.
GN and LM weighting conventions are inconsistent.
Dynamic refinement lacks explicit V24 F, Q, and Pi semantics.
Broad exception fallbacks can silently convert failed LM/MAP cases into IL results.
recommended_next_action: Treat the notebook optimizer as legacy provenance only; use package-native V24-gauged optimizer/status paths for any candidate result regeneration.
scope_boundary_encountered: Package code comparison out of scope.
